phrases.intent_en: Ask where the AVE ticket counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla de AVE?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah tah-KEE-yah deh AH-veh?

likely_response.local: Junto a la entrada principal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, next to the entrance.

responses.english: On the ground floor, next to the entrance.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Junto a la entrada principal, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the baggage storage is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la consigna de equipajes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh es-TAH lah kon-SEE-nyah deh eh-kee-PAH-hes?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del vestíbulo, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the hall, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the hall, on the left.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Al fondo del vestíbulo, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to make seat reservations
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde hago la reserva de asientos?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-ahs, DON-deh AH-goh lah reh-SER-vah deh ah-seh-YEHN-tohs?

likely_response.local: En la misma taquilla de venta de billetes.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH MEE-smah tah-k-EEL-lah DEH BEHN-tah DEH beel-LEH-tehs
likely_response.translation_en: At the same ticket sales counter.

responses.english: At the same ticket sales counter.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH MEE-smah tah-k-EEL-lah DEH BEHN-tah DEH beel-LEH-tehs
responses.french: En la misma taquilla de venta de billetes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to change or refund tickets
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo cambiar o devolver mis billetes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWAY-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-day PWAY-doh kahm-BYAR oh day-vohl-VEHR mees bee-YEH-tehs?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla de atención, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah DEH ah-tehn-thee-ÓN AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the service desk, on the right.

responses.english: At the service desk, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah DEH ah-tehn-thee-ÓN AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En la taquilla de atención, a la derecha.
